overview: ZOLA is a bold cultural-fusion lifestyle brand e-commerce platform blending Indian/Mughal, Japanese, Mexican, African, and vintage Americana aesthetics with streetwear energy. Features dual visual modes (Be Funky / Chic Look), full authentication, shopping cart, Stripe checkout, wishlist, and an admin dashboard for product and inventory management.
features: Dual theme modes: Be Funky (neon/street-art) and Chic Look (refined elegance)
Product catalog with category filtering and product detail pages
Admin dashboard: product CRUD + inventory management with low-stock alerts
Cultural motifs (block print, paisley, mandala) across all pages
